/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/fountain_tool.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain_tool.dir/src/FountainParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain_tool.dir/src/OllamaClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain_tool.dir/src/Summarizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fountain_tool.dir/src/SessionManager.cpp.o -o fountain_tool  /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
